rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0001
rows.name:
From here, compared to taking the Industrial
Area's West Gate we used earlier[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0002
rows.name: it's closer from the BLADE Area's East Gate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0003
rows.name: Lin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0004
rows.name:
Weren't all the gates sealed because
high-rank native creatures appeared nearby?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0005
rows.name:
They were, but the alert level dropped a
little while ago and the lockdown was lifted.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0006
rows.name:
Some team must have defeated
the native creatures for us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_JNK0010
rows.name: Boast

rows.label: xs02020150_SEL0011
rows.name: Puff out your chest and say you defeated it

rows.label: xs02020150_JNK0020
rows.name: Deduce

rows.label: xs02020150_SEL0021
rows.name: Recall Iriina and Gwin, and ask

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0007
rows.name: Huh? Was it really you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0008
rows.name: That's not what happened.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0009
rows.name:
The Lupus we fought were low-rank. They
weren't enough of a threat to seal all gates.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0010
rows.name: Yeah, that's true, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0011
rows.name:
More importantly, you took down
Lupus? Just the two of you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0012
rows.name: That's amazing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0013
rows.name:
Lupus move in packs, so all the teams
have been struggling with them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0014
rows.name: Don't get carried away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0015
rows.name:
And Lin, don't overdo the praise.
It'd be bad if the newbie got hurt.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0017
rows.name: Sorry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0018
rows.name:
With Iriina's team's skill,
it's certainly possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0020
rows.name: Did you meet Iriina-san and Gwin-san?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0020_m
rows.name: Did you meet Iriina-san and Gwin-san?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0020_f
rows.name: Did you meet Iriina-san and Gwin-san?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0021
rows.name:
Yes, a little before we met you, Lin. It
seems they were on their way to a mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0022
rows.name:
If they were heading out on a mission,
then it was definitely them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0024
rows.name:
Ahh, I wish I could've seen
Iriina-san and the others in action.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0025
rows.name: I'm sure you'll get to see them soon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0026
rows.name:
Right, that's enough idle chat.
Let's get back to the mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0027
rows.name: Right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs02020150_MSG0028
rows.name:
Okay then, let's head to the
destination from the East Gate![ST:wait ]
